title: Kinemon and Kanjuro Fall Behind
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on kinemon and kanjuro fall behind within the Climbing the Elephant storyline.
scene: Luffy's group climbs Zunesha, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro behind them, then enters the empty and damaged Mokomo Dukedom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Something's headed right this way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What falls towards our friends climbing the elephant!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Etete Tete!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Tete teeee EEE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Ete?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Indeed; Raizo the Ninja goes "tetete" when he runs around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Remember to

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap, that thing's gonna hit us! Dodge it!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Ninja Art: Blindfold No Jutsu! Guess~ Whoo~!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa! Um! err! I do believe it is you, Kanjuro!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: You're the only person behind me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Get out of the way, you two!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Seri-ously...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember to

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Crap, that thing's gonna hit us! Dodge it!

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: Ninja Art: Blindfold No Jutsu! Guess~ Whoo~!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whoa! Um! err! I do believe it is you, Kanjuro!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: You're the only person behind me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hm?

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Get out of the way, you two!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Seri-ously...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WAAA AAAA AGH!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Kinemon! Kanjuro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AAA AGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh crap! They fell off!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Damn it! Did anyone get a good look at the thing that slammed into them!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cannot say for certain! At first glance it appeared to be a man covered in blood, with countless knives wedged into him, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are your first impressions always so morbid!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As it turned out, it just happened to be a small monkey.

summary: Kinemon and Kanjuro Fall Behind: Luffy's group reaches the country on Zunesha's back, loses Kinemon and Kanjuro temporarily, and discovers that Zou has already been devastated.
